subcodes.first_line: O concourse of the earth! How long will ye prevent the Youth from making mention of His Lord, the All-Glorious, the All-Knowing? And how long will ye remain occupied [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض الی متی یمنعون الغلام عن ذکر ربه العزیز العلام و الی متی تشتغلون
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
